title: onobrychis verae
intro: Onobrychis verae, also known as Common Goat's Rue or Milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis verae include reducing inflammation and improving lung function, making it a potential natural remedy for people suffering from respiratory problems like asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Onobrychis verae is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
